eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Lewis, WV; at 10:18 PM on JUL 21, 2026 Effective until 11:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: FOR ALL RESIDENCE AFFECTED BY THE FLOODING, THERE IS A SHELTER OPEN AT THE LEWIS COUNTY HIGH SCHOOL. USE EXIT 96 FROM I-79 TO MAKE ACCESS TO THE SHELTER. IF IN NEED OF EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE, CALL 911. DO NOT DRIVE THROUGH FLOOD WATERS. TURN AROUND, DON'T DROWN.
